SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method
No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

DID.NAME: Power Point Relay Reset Circuit Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Power Point Relay Reset Circuit Status

DID.NAME: Power Point Relay Set Circuit Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Power Point Relay Set Circuit Status

DID.NAME: Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit Output Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit Output Status

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: No Fault Detected - Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit Output Commanded Off
No Fault Detected - Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit Output Commanded On
Short to Ground Detected - Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit Output Commanded off until next retry cycle criteria satisifed
Over Voltage or Under Voltage detected - Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit
Short to Power Detected - Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit Output Commanded OFF
Open Circuit Detected - Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit Output Commanded OFF
Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit Output Commanded OFF - A FET life limit reached - Service action req'd to re-enable FET

DID.NAME: Park By Wire Motor Circuit Output Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Park By Wire Motor Circuit Output Status

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: No Fault Detected - Park By Wire Motor Circuit Output Commanded Off
No Fault Detected - Park By Wire Motor Circuit Output Commanded On
Short to Ground Detected - Park By Wire Motor Circuit Output Commanded off until next retry cycle criteria satisifed
Over Voltage or Under Voltage Detected - Park By Wire Motor Circuit
Short to Power Detected - Park By Wire Motor Circuit Output Commanded Off
Open Circuit Detected - Park By Wire Motor Circuit Output Commanded Off
Park By Wire Motor Circuit Output Commanded OFF - A FET Life Limit Reached - Service Action req'd to re-enable FET
A/C Clutch Disable Override Not Supported
Attempting Re-enable, Waiting For Command To Turn On A/C Clutch
Failed - Short Still Exists. A/C Clutch Remains Disabled

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Heated Windscreen Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized
DC/AC Inverter - Output Circuit is Commanded to be Energized
Vehicle Horn - Output Circuit is Commanded to be Energized by the Vehicle Horn Alarm
Park By Wire Solenoid Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized
Park By Wire Motor Circuit - Output Circuit is Commanded to be Energized
A/C Clutch Control Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized
A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve A Control Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized
Engine Coolant Bypass Valve D Control Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized
AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve C Control Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized
AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve B Control Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Control Valve A Control Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized
Engine Coolant Bypass Valve E Control Circuit - Output Circuit Is Commanded to be Energized

DID.NAME: AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve C Output Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve C Output Status

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: No Fault Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "C" Output Commanded Off
No Fault Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "C" Output Commanded On
Short to Ground Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "C" Output Commanded off until next retry cycle criteria satisifed
Short to Power Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "C" Output Commanded OFF
Open Circuit Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "C" Output Commanded OFF
AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "C" Output Commanded OFF - A FET life limit reached - Service action req'd to re-enable FET

DID.NAME: A/C Clutch Control Circuit Output Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: A/C Clutch Control Circuit Output Status

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: No Fault Detected - AC Clutch Control Circuit Output Commanded Off
No Fault Detected - AC Clutch Control Circuit Output Commanded On
Short to Ground Detected - AC Clutch Control Circuit Output Commanded off until next retry cycle criteria satisifed
Short to Power Detected - AC Clutch Control Circuit Output Commanded OFF
Open Circuit Detected - AC Clutch Control Circuit Output Commanded OFF
AC Clutch Control Circuit Output Commanded OFF - A FET life limit reached - Service action req'd to re-enable FET
A/C Clutch Control Circuit Output Status is not available (e.g., loss of CAN communication with the ECU providing this status)

DID.NAME: AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve B Output Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve B Output Status

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: No Fault Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Output Commanded Off
No Fault Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Output Commanded On
Short to Ground Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Output Commanded off until next retry cycle criteria satisifed
Short to Power Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Output Commanded OFF
Open Circuit Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Output Commanded OFF
AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Output Commanded OFF - A FET life limit reached - Service action req'd to re-enable FET

DID.NAME: AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve A Output Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve A Output Status

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: No Fault Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Output Commanded Off
No Fault Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Output Commanded On
Short to Ground Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Output Commanded off until next retry cycle criteria satisifed
Short to Power Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Output Commanded OFF
Open Circuit Detected - AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Output Commanded OFF
AC Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Output Commanded OFF - A FET life limit reached - Service action req'd to re-enable FET

DID.NAME: FET Short Actual Life Cycle Count

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Traction Battery Coolant Valve Actual FET Short Count
Front Evaporator Shut Off Valve Actual FET Short Count
Rear Evaporator Shut Off Valve Actual FET Short Count
Battery Chiller Refrigerant Shut Off Valve Actual FET Short Count
Rear Heater Core Coolant Shut Off Valve Actual FET Short Count
Horn Control Output Actual FET Short Count
AC Clutch Control Output Actual FET Short Count
Park by Wire Motor Output Actual FET Short Count
Park by Wire Solenoid Output Actual FET Short Count
Upfitter Module Output Actual FET Short Count
Brake Lighting Output Actual FET Short Count
Heated Wiper Park Output Actual FET Short Count
Rear Defrost Output Actual FET Short Count
Glovebox Latch Output Actual FET Short Count
DCDC Output Actual FET Short Count
CAVS Output Actual FET Short Count
AVS Output Actual FET Short Count
Auxiliary Brake Lamp Output Actual FET Short Count

DID.NAME: Variable Power Moding (VPM) Input Type Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: VPM Bus 8 Request Type - Inverter Power Bus Request Type
VPM Bus 7 Request Type - Demand Lamps Power Bus Request Type
VPM Bus 6 Request Type - Rear Heated Cooled Seats (SCMF) Power Bus Request Type
VPM Bus 9 Request Type - Vehicle Dynamics Module (VDM) Power Bus Request Type

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: No Fault Detected - Output Commanded Off
No Fault Detected - Output Commanded On
FET Not Controlled - DC/AC Inverter Output Commanded Off
Short to Ground Detected - DC/AC Inverter Output Commanded Off Until Next Retry Cycle Criteria Satisifed
Short to Power - DC/AC Inverter Output Commanded Off
Open Circuit - DC/AC Inverter Output Commanded Off
Life Limit Reached - DC/AC Inverter Output Commanded Off - Service Action Required To Re-enable FET
Feature Controlling Horn Service - Software Over the Air (SOA)

SUB_FIELD.NAME: VPM Bus 1 Arb - Run Start Power Bus Arbitration
VPM Bus 2 Arb - Delayed Acc Power Bus Arbitration
VPM Bus 3 Arb - ADAS Power Bus Arbitration
VPM Bus 4 Arb - Battery Saver Power Bus Arbitration
VPM Bus 5 Arb - Headlamp Control Module Power Bus Arbitration
VPM Bus 6 Arb - Rear Heated Cooled Seats (SCMF) Power Bus Arbitration
VPM Bus 7 Arb - Demand Lamps Power Bus Arbitration
VPM Bus 8 Arb - Inverter Power Bus Arbitration
VPM Bus 9 Arb - Vehicle Dynamics Module (VDM) Power Bus Arbitration

DID.NAME: Variable Power Moding (VPM) Request ID Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: VPM Bus 1 RqstID - Run Start Power Bus RqstID
VPM Bus 2 RqstID - Delayed Acc Power Bus RqstID
VPM Bus 3 RqstID - ADAS Power Bus RqstID
VPM Bus 4 RqstID - Battery Saver ECUs Power Bus RqstID
VPM Bus 5 RqstID - Headlamp Control Module (HCM) Power Bus RqstID
VPM Bus 6 RqstID - Rear Heated Colled Seats (SCMF) Power Bus RqstID
VPM Bus 7 RqstID - Demand Lamps Power Bus RqstID
VPM Bus 8 RqstID - Inverter Power Bus RqstID
VPM Bus 9 RqstID - Vehicle Dynamics Module (VDM) Power Bus RqstID

DID.NAME: Variable Power Moding (VPM) Input Commanded Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: VPM Bus 8 Request - Inverter Power Bus is Commanded to be Energized by Software Over The Air (SOA)
VPM Bus 7 Request - Demand Lamp Power Bus is Commanded to be Activated by Software Over The Air (SOA)
VPM Bus 6 Request - Rear Heated Cooled Seats (SCMF) Power Bus is Commanded to be Energized by Software Over The Air (SOA)
VPM Bus 9 Request - Vehicle Dynamics Module (VDM) Power Bus is Commanded to be Energized by Software Over The Air (SOA)

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Validation Application Routine Not Executed This Session

DID.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash

SUB_FIELD.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash

DID.NAME: OTA ProgrammingSession Entry And A/B Swap Precondition Status

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Loop-Time overflow or scheduler idle time overflow Counter

DID.NAME: ECU Up Time From Ignition On or Wake-up

SUB_FIELD.NAME: ECU Up Time From Ignition On or Wake-up

DID.NAME: External BUS Message Checksum Fault Counter

SUB_FIELD.NAME: External BUS Message Checksum Fault Counter

DID.NAME: Internal BUS Message Checksum Fault Counter

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Internal BUS Message Checksum Fault Counter
Boot Software Version Number- Main Version
Boot Software Version Number- Sub Version
Boot Software Version Number- Release Version
ECU Network Signal Calibration Download Successful
Global Central Configuration Data Block Download Successful

DID.NAME: Subsystem Specific Diagnostic Specification Part Number

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Subsystem Specific Diagnostic Specification Part Number

DID.NAME: NOS Bootloader Generation Tool Version Number

SUB_FIELD.NAME: NOS Bootloader Generation Tool Version Number
Number Of Modules (ISO14229 compatibility - always set to 01h)
Boot Software Identifcation Data (Part no. of the bootloader)

DID.NAME: Delete Solid State Driver Protection DTC D00000

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Delete Solid State Driver Protection DTC D00000

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Solid State Driver Protection DTC D00000 Do Not Delete
Solid State Driver Protection DTC D00000 Delete
ECU Fault DTC F00049 Do not Delete

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Control Circuit/Open

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. FESOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2. FESOV feature is Enabled 3. FESOV Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Batttery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: (1 and 2 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria : No open circuit fault is detected for FESOV Fail criteria : Open circuit fault is detected for FESOV

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Control Circuit Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1 .FESOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2. FESOV feature is Enabled 3. FESOV continuous DTC is not suppressed and FESOV Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both FESOV self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria conditions: 1. No SHORT to Ground detected for FESOV circuit 2. FESOV FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count 3. FESOV FET is turned ON for 350msec and no fault is detected during this time Pass criteria: (1 and 2 and 3) Fail criteria conditions: 1. Short to Ground detected for FESOV circuit 2. FESOV FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail criteria: (1 or 2)

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve "B" Control Circuit High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. FESOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2. FESOV feature is Enabled 3. FESOV Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Crieria : No Short to Bat is detected for FESOV circuit Fail Criteria : Short to Bat is detected for FESOV circuit

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Control Circuit/Open

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. CHSOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2. CHSOV feature is Enabled 3. CHSOV Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1. (1 and 2 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : No open circuit fault detected for CHSOV circuit Fail Criteria : Open circuit fault detected for CHSOV circuit

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Control Circuit Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. CHSOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2. CHSOV feature is Enabled 3. CHSOV continuous DTC is not suppressed and CHSOV Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both CHSOV self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria conditions: 1. No SHORT to Ground detected for CHSOV circuit 2. CHSOV FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count 3. CHSOV FET is turned ON for 350msec and no fault is detected during this time Pass criteria: (1 and 2 and 3) Fail criteria conditions: 1. Short to Ground detected for CHSOV circuit 2. CHSOV FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail criteria: (1 or 2)

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve "A" Control Circuit High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. CHSOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2. CHSOV feature is Enabled 3. CHSOV Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Crieria : No Short to Bat is detected for CHSOV circuit Fail Criteria : Short to Bat is detected for CHSOV circuit

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Clutch Control Circuit

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. AC Clutch output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. AC Clutch feature is Enabled 3. AC Clutch continuous DTC is not suppressed and AC Clutch Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both AC Clutch self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 5. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3 and 5) 2.(1 and 2 and 4 and 5)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : No Open circuit fault detected for ACClutch circuit Fail Criteria : Open circuit fault detected for ACClutch circuit

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Clutch Control Circuit Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. AC Clutch output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. AC Clutch feature is Enabled 3. AC Clutch continuous DTC is not suppressed and AC Clutch Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both AC Clutch self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria conditions: 1. No SHORT to Ground detected for AC Clutch circuit 2. AC Clutch FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count 3. AC Clutch FET is turned ON for 350msec and no fault is detected during this time Pass criteria: (1 and 2 and 3) Fail criteria conditions: 1. Short to Ground detected for AC Clutch circuit 2. AC Clutch FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail criteria: (1 or 2)

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Clutch Control Circuit High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. AC Clutch output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. AC Clutch feature is Enabled 3. AC Clutch continuous DTC is not suppressed and AC Clutch Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both AC Clutch self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 5. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3 and 5) 2.(1 and 2 and 4 and 5)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Crieria : No Short to Bat is detected for AC Clutch circuit Fail Criteria : Short to Bat is detected for AC Clutch circuit

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Demand Lamp Output

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Demand Lamp control circuit is present in Hardware 2. Demand Lamp feature is Enabled 3. Demand Lamp continuous DTC is not suppressed and Demand Lamp Self test demand DTC is suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria conditions: 1. No SHORT to Ground detected for DemandLamp circuit 2. DemandLamp FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count 3. DemandLamp FET is turned ON for 350msec and no fault is detected during this time Pass criteria: (1 and 2 and 3) Fail criteria conditions: 1. Short to Ground detected for DemandLamp circuit 2. DemandLamp FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail criteria: (1 or 2)

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Park By Wire Solenoid Output

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Park By Wire Solenoid output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. Park By Wire feature is Enabled 3. Park By Wire Solenoid continuous DTC is not suppressed and Park By Wire Solenoid Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both Park By Wire Solenoid self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria conditions: 1. No SHORT to Ground detected for Park By Wire Solenoid circuit 2. Park By Wire Solenoid FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count 3. Park By Wire Solenoid FET is turned ON for 350msec and no fault is detected during this time Pass criteria: (1 and 2 and 3) Fail criteria conditions: 1. Short to Ground detected for Park By Wire Solenoid circuit 2. Park By Wire Solenoid FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail criteria: (1 or 2)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Park By Wire Solenoid output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. Park By Wire feature is Enabled 3. Park By Wire Solenoid continuous DTC is not suppressed and Park By Wire Solenoid Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both Park By Wire Solenoid self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : Battery voltage for Park By Wire Solenoid circuit is under 8V for less than 500msec Fail Criteria : Battery voltage for Park By Wire Solenoid circuit is under 8V for more than 500msec

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Park By Wire Solenoid output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. Park By Wire feature is Enabled 3. Park By Wire Solenoid continuous DTC is not suppressed and Park By Wire Solenoid Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both Park By Wire Solenoid self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria :Battery voltage for Park By Wire Solenoid circuit is above 16V for less than 500msec Fail Criteria :Battery voltage for Park By Wire Solenoid circuit is above 16V for more than 500msec

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Park By Wire Motor Output

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Park By Wire Motor output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. Park By Wire feature is Enabled 3. Park By Wire Motor continuous DTC is not suppressed and Park By Wire Motor Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both Park By Wire Motor self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria conditions: 1. No SHORT to Ground detected for Park By Wire Motor circuit 2. Park By Wire Motor FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count 3. Park By Wire Motor FET is turned ON for 330msec and no fault is detected during this time Pass criteria: (1 and 2 and 3) Fail criteria conditions: 1. Short to Ground detected for Park By Wire Motor circuit 2. Park By Wire Motor FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail criteria: (1 or 2)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Park By Wire Motor output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. Park By Wire feature is Enabled 3. Park By Wire Motor continuous DTC is not suppressed and Park By Wire Motor Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both Park By Wire Motor self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : Battery voltage for Park By Wire Motor circuit is under 8V for less than 500msec Fail Criteria : Battery voltage for Park By Wire Motor circuit is under 8V for more than 500msec

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Park By Wire Motor output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. Park By Wire feature is Enabled 3. Park By Wire Motor continuous DTC is not suppressed and Park By Wire Motor Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both Park By Wire Motor self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria :Battery voltage for Park By Wire Motor circuit is above 16V for less than 500msec Fail Criteria :Battery voltage for Park By Wire Motor circuit is above 16V for more than 500msec

DTC.DESCRIPTION: DC/AC Inverter Output

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. DCAC control circuit is present in Hardware 2. DCAC_Behaviour_Cfg Method-2 configuration is not configured as INVERTER_LESS 3. DCAC continuous DTC is not suppressed and DCAC Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both DCAC self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria conditions: 1. No SHORT to Ground detected for DCAC circuit 2. DCAC FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count 3. DCAC FET is turned ON for 350msec and no fault is detected during this time Pass criteria: (1 and 2 and 3) Fail criteria conditions: 1. Short to Ground detected for DCAC circuit 2. DCAC FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail criteria: (1 or 2)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. DCAC control circuit is present in Hardware 2. DCAC_Behaviour_Cfg Method-2 configuration is not configured as INVERTER_LESS 3. DCAC continuous DTC is not suppressed and DCAC Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both DCAC self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Crieria : No Short to Bat is detected for DCAC circuit Fail Criteria : Short to Bat is detected for DCAC circuit

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Horn Relay

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Horn output control circuit is present in Hardware 2. Horn feature is Enabled 3. Horn continuous DTC is not suppressed and Horn Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both Horn self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : Horn is not Stuck Fail Criteria : Horn is Stuck

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve Actuator "C" Control Circuit/Open

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.RESOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2.RESOV feature is Enabled 3.RESOV Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: (1 and 2 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : No Open circuit fault detected for RESOV circuit Fail Criteria : Open circuit fault detected for RESOV circuit

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve Actuator "C" Control Circuit Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. RESOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2. RESOV feature is Enabled 3. RESOV continuous DTC is not suppressed and RESOV Self test demand DTC is suppressed 4. Both RESOV self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 2 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria conditions: 1. No SHORT to Ground detected for RESOV circuit 2. RESOV FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count 3. RESOV FET is turned ON for 350msec and no fault is detected during this time Pass criteria: (1 and 2 and 3) Fail criteria conditions: 1. Short to Ground detected for RESOV circuit 2. RESOV FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail criteria: (1 or 2)

DTC.DESCRIPTION: A/C Refrigerant Distribution Valve Actuator "C" Control Circuit High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.RESOV control circuit is present in Hardware 2.RESOV feature is Enabled 3.RESOV Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: (1 and 2 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Crieria : No Short to Bat is detected for RESOV circuit Fail Criteria : Short to Bat is detected for RESOV circuit

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With ECM/PCM "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Ignition_Status is in running mode 2. 0xC10087 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xC10087 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 3. Both 0xC10087 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Battery volateg must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 4) 2.(1 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : ElPw_D_Stat signal is recieved in less than 5sec Fail Criteria : ElPw_D_Stat signal is not recieved/ is missing for more than 5sec

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Battery Energy Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Ignition_Status is in running mode 2. 0xC11187 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xC11187 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 3. Both 0xC11187 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 4) 2.(1 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq signal is recieved in less than 5sec Fail Criteria : BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq signal is not recieved/ is missing for more than 5sec

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Ignition_Status is in running mode 2. 0xC12187 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xC12187 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 3. Both 0xC12187 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Batttery Voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 3) 2.(1 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : Veh_V_ActlBrk CAN signal is recieved in less than 5sec Fail Criteria : Veh_V_ActlBrk CAN signal is not recieved/ is missing for more than 5sec

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Network is not in sleep mode 2. 0xC14087 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xC14087 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 3. Both 0xC14087 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Battery voltage must be 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 4) 2.(1 and 3 and 4)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : Ignition_Status signal is recieved in less than 5sec Fail Criteria : Ignition_Status signal is not recieved/ is missing for more than 5sec

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With HVAC Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Ignition_Status is in running mode 2. 0xC16487 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xC16487 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 3. Both 0xC16487 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. Aux Blower feature is Enabled 5. Front Left Defrost feature is Enabled 6. Front Right Defrost feature is Enabled 7. Rear Defrost feature is Enabled 8. PTC Heater1 feature is Enabled 9. PTC Heater2 feature is Enabled 10. PTC Heater3 feature is Enabled 11. Battery voltage must be within 10V-15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 11 and (4 or 5 or 6 or 7 or 8 or 9 or 10)) 2.(1 and 3 and 11 and (4 or 5 or 6 or 7 or 8 or 9 or 10))
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : FrontLeft_Defrost_Rqst FrontRight_Defrost_Rqst Rear_Defrost_Rqst Aux_Blower_Rqst PTCHeater1_Rqst PTCHeater2_Rqst PTCHeater3_Rqst Any of the above signal is/are recieved in less than 5sec Fail Criteria : FrontLeft_Defrost_Rqst FrontRight_Defrost_Rqst Rear_Defrost_Rqst Aux_Blower_Rqst PTCHeater1_Rqst PTCHeater2_Rqst PTCHeater3_Rqst Any of the above signal is/are not recieved/ is missing for more than 5sec

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Ignition_Status is in running mode 2. 0xC29387 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xC29387 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 3. Both 0xC29387 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) 4. RESOV feature is Enabled 5. FESOV feature is Enabled 6. CHSOV feature is Enabled 7. Battery voltage must be within 10V to 15.5V Test run criteria: 1.(1 and 2 and 7 and (4 or 5 or 6)) 2.(1 and 3 and 7 and (4 or 5 or 6))
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq CAN signal is recieved in less than 5sec Fail Criteria : CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq CAN signal is not recieved/ is missing for more than 5sec

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Solid State Driver Protection Active -Driver Disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.0xD00000 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xD00000 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 2. Both 0xD00000 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: (1 or 2)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : Solid State Driver Protection FET is operatable i.e FET fault count is not at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count Fail Criteria : Solid State Driver Protection FET is not operatable i.e FET fault count is at 1/3 or 2/3 or 3/3 of its max life count

DTC.DESCRIPTION: In-Use Application Signing Key

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. 0xE02B61 Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: (1)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria :Development Key is Disabled for Software signature verification process Fail Criteria :Development Key is Enabled for Software signature verification process

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. 0xE02B62 Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: (1)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : When development key is Disabled, the software signed key should be production key for software signature verification process Fail Criteria : When development key is Enabled and the software signed key is Development key for software signature verification process

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Initial Configuration Not Complete

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. 0xE10000 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xE10000 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 2. Both 0xE10000 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: (1 or 2)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : ECU is Configured Fail Criteria : ECU is not Configured

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Configuration Memory Corrupt

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. 0xE20000 continuous DTC is not suppressed and 0xE20000 Self test demand DTC is suppressed 2. Both 0xE20000 self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: (1 or 2)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : DTC 0xE20000 cannot be cleared Fail Criteria : EEPROM Failure

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. ECU Fault continuous DTC is not suppressed and ECU Fault Self test demand DTC is suppressed 2. Both ECU Fault self test and continuous DTC are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: (1 or 2)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : ECU Fault DTC cannot be cleared Fail Criteria : 1. ROM Failure occurs 2. FET short count is greater than or equal to Max FET life count 3. Microprocessor clock failure occurs more than 3 times 4. pull-up failure occures when Ignition_Status is in (Runnng or Accessory) and Battery Voltage is between 9V to 15.5V, for four consecutive Pull-Up activations, given any Power feed are present (>8 volt) Fail Criteria: (1 or 2 or 3 or 4)

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Battery Voltage

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. 0xF00316 Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: (1)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : Battery Voltage is greater than or equal to 10V Fail Criteria : Battery Voltage is less than 10V

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. 0xF00317 Selftest or Continuous DTC or both are not suppressed (Please refer section 3.14.3.11 DTCSuppression_Cfg array index details) Test run criteria: (1)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria : Battery Voltage is less than or equal to 17V Fail Criteria : Battery Voltage is greater than 17V

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present

ROUTINE.NAME: Obtain Solid State Driver Life Counter

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Solid State Driver Short Circuit Counts
